message:
fix: convert literal \t and \n escape sequences in type payloads

MCP payloads contain literal backslash-t and backslash-n strings
rather than actual tab/newline characters. Added preprocessing
to convert these before parsing.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
